welcomeSubtitle: Creating a Zootopia Club account gives you a personalized learning experience tailored to your major and academic year.
supportText: This platform was developed and supervised by Ebn Abdallah Yousef, Class of 2022, Chemistry & Zoology Double Major. Please keep me in your prayers.
englishOnly: Please enter this field in English only.
usernameEnglishOnly: Username must use English letters, numbers, or allowed symbols only.
emailEnglishOnly: Please enter a valid email in English.
nameEnglishOnly: Please enter your full name in English.
deptEnglishOnly: Please enter your academic department in English.
passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
invalidUniversityCode: University code must be 7 or 8 digits.
usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters.
terms: By completing registration, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. Your data is securely stored and used only for academic purposes within Zootopia Club.
auth.secondaryActionsHint: Create a full account or switch to the protected administrator entrance.
auth.fastAccessAudience: Phone-first access built for Cairo University science students.
fastAccess.title: Faculty Fast Access
fastAccess.subtitle: Temporary OTP-first entry for Cairo University Faculty of Science students.
fastAccess.securityNote: This lane is intentionally isolated from full accounts. It creates temporary, clearly marked student records and must never replace full registration.
fastAccess.step1Hint: Enter your phone number, request OTP, then verify it to unlock student details.
fastAccess.otpHint: Use the 6-digit code sent to your phone.
fastAccess.step2Hint: Complete required student fields to finish temporary access activation.
fastAccess.codePrefixHint: Rule: Student code must be exactly 7 digits and start with the last two digits of batch year.
fastAccess.statusOtpVerified: Phone verified. Continue with student details.
fastAccess.toastOtpVerified: Phone verified. Complete your student details.
fastAccess.toastGranted: Welcome to Faculty of Science fast access.
fastAccess.errorPhoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number in international format.
fastAccess.errorOtpSixDigits: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your phone.
fastAccess.errorSessionExpired: Verification session expired. Please verify OTP again.
fastAccess.errorCodeSevenDigits: Student code must be exactly 7 digits.
fastAccess.errorYearRange: Batch year must be between {{min}} and {{max}}.
fastAccess.errorCodeYearPrefix: Student code must start with {{prefix}} for batch year {{year}}.
enterEmailToReset: Enter your email to receive a reset link
secureAccess: Secure access for Zootopia Club administrators.
welcomeMessageNew: We are thrilled to have you join our community. Explore the tools, generate quizzes, and elevate your studies.
welcomeMessageReturning: Ready to continue your learning journey? Let's dive back in.
creatorMessageBody: This platform was built with love by Ibn Abdullah Youssef (Class of 2022, Chemistry & Zoology). Please keep me in your prayers.
requestSentDesc: Your request for {{amount}} credits has been submitted to the admin for review.
notePlaceholder: Why do you need more credits? (e.g., preparing for exams, research project...)
creditRequestNotice: Requests are usually reviewed within 24 hours. You can request up to 21 credits at a time.
basmala: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful
ultimatePlatform: The ultimate AI platform for scientific excellence.
exhaustedCredits: You've exhausted your AI credits. Request more to continue using AI features.
plan-free-description: Perfect for getting started with AI-powered science learning.
plan-plus-description: Powerful tools for advanced research and study.
plan-enterprise-description: Custom solutions for institutions and large teams.
selectTool: Select a tool from the sidebar to begin
uploadUI.errorDropRejected: Unsupported file format or too many files selected. Upload one supported file at a time.
uploadUI.supportedFormatsHint: PDF, Word, Excel/CSV, Images, or Text (Max 50MB)
uploadUI.errorFileTooLarge: File too large. Max size is 50MB.
uploadUI.errorNoExtractableText: No extractable text was found in this file. Try another file or a clearer scan.
uploadUI.errorPdfWorkerSetupFailed: PDF worker setup failed. Please refresh and try again. If it continues, contact support.
uploadUI.errorPdfParsingFailed: PDF parsing failed. The file may be damaged, protected, or contain unsupported structure.
uploadUI.errorExtractionFailed: Text extraction failed for this file. Try another file or format.
uploadUI.errorUnknown: Something went wrong while processing your file.
uploadUI.errorNoPermission: You do not have permission to upload files.
uploadUI.errorDailyLimitReached: You have reached your daily upload limit.
uploadUI.errorProcessingTimedOut: File processing timed out. The file might be too complex.
uploadUI.errorAnalysisTimedOut: AI analysis timed out. This often happens with large documents. Please try a faster model or try again.
uploadUI.uploadFirstTitle: Upload your lecture once, then choose the next step with clarity.
uploadUI.uploadFirstHint: Make the file the center of the workflow: upload it here, then continue into lecture summarization or question generation without visual clutter.
uploadUI.uploadHeroIdleHint: Start with the file, then choose whether you want a lecture summary or instantly generated questions.
uploadUI.uploadHeroDraggingHint: Release the file here and we will prepare it for summarization and question generation.
uploadUI.uploadHeroUploadingHint: We are extracting the lecture content so the next actions can unlock smoothly.
uploadUI.uploadFormatsSummary: Trusted upload for lectures, sheets, and study documents
uploadUI.fileReadyHint: Choose what you want to do next: summarize the lecture or jump into question generation.
uploadUI.filePreparingHint: We are still preparing the lecture so the next actions can unlock cleanly.
uploadUI.fileNeedsAttentionHint: The file is attached, but preparation failed. Replace it or remove it to continue.
uploadUI.nextActionTitle: What do you want to do with this lecture now?
uploadUI.lectureSummaryCtaDescription: Open the dedicated analysis workspace for a focused lecture summary, insights, and exports.
uploadUI.generateQuestionsNowCtaDescript: Open the dedicated assessment generator workspace and keep using the same shared prepared file.
uploadUI.questionWorkspaceHint: Your uploaded lecture is already prepared. Tune the settings below and generate quizzes or question sets from the same shared file.
uploadUI.assessmentPrimaryHint: Generate quizzes and question sets directly from the uploaded document while Analysis remains a separate focused destination.
uploadUI.assessmentWorkspaceHint: Review the uploaded document, open the analysis workspace when needed, then move into quiz or question generation with a cleaner split between both stages.
uploadUI.analysisWorkspaceHint: Choose a model, start analysis when ready, then continue into generation.
uploadUI.analysisWorkspaceClosedHint: Open the analysis workspace whenever you want more room to inspect the document before generation.
uploadUI.analysisLaunchTitle: You can now analyze and summarize the lecture from here.
uploadUI.analysisLaunchDescription: Open the dedicated Analysis page whenever you want summaries, insights, and exports without crowding the quiz generator.
uploadUI.analysisGateHint: The file is uploaded and prepared, but analysis stays fully manual. Choose the analysis model and start it only when you want.
uploadUI.analysisInputHint: This workspace stays manual by design. Review the file, choose the analysis model, then start when you want.
uploadUI.analysisManualStartHint: Analysis will not run until you choose a model and click the start button.
uploadUI.assessmentBoundaryHint: The assessment studio now stays visually separate from analysis so you can review the document first, then generate with less clutter and stronger hierarchy.
uploadUI.generationUnlockedAfterAnalysis: Assessment controls stay separate from analysis
uploadUI.nonAssessmentDocumentHint: This tool can use the shared uploaded document without changing the assessment workflow.
uploadUI.chatDocumentHint: Your conversation can reference the shared uploaded document while keeping chat model selection independent.
customInstructionsPlaceholder: Any specific focus areas or requirements for the {{mode}}?
revisionDescription: Focus on key concepts and summaries
describeScientificVisualization: Describe the scientific visualization you need...
enterPromptToCreateVisuals: Enter a prompt to create scientific visuals
describeScientificAnimation: Describe the scientific animation or process...
useVeoToCreateAnimations: Use Veo 3 to create scientific animations
trackRecentActions: Track your recent actions and generated content
actionsAppearHere: Your actions will appear here as you use the platform.
aiAssistantGreeting: Hello! I am your Zootopia Club AI Assistant. How can I help you with your scientific studies today?
noPermissionChatbot: You do not have permission to use the chatbot.
liveVoiceDescription: Have a real-time scientific conversation with Zootopia AI using next-generation native audio technology.
liveSessionStartedGreeting: Live session started. How can I help you today?
noPermissionLiveVoice: You do not have permission to use live voice.
transformComplexData: Transform complex data into professional visual stories with AI-driven design intelligence.
infographicProTip: Mentioning specific data tables or key findings from your source will help the AI create more accurate visualizations.
noPermissionGenerateInfographics: You do not have permission to generate infographics.
infographicDirectivesPlaceholder: e.g., Focus on the methodology, use a dark cyberpunk theme, include biological icons...
messagePlaceholder: Please describe your request in detail...
noRequestsYet: You haven't submitted any requests yet.
aiSummaryDesc: Get a concise summary of the lecture.
customInstructionsPlaceholder: e.g., Focus on specific chapters, use bullet points, or explain like I'm 5...
selectToolToGenerate: Select a tool to generate insights
noPermissionStudyTools: You do not have permission to use study tools.
dailyLimitReached: You have reached your daily AI request limit.
accountSettingsDesc: Manage your profile, security preferences, and account details.
deleteAccountDesc: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
deleteAccountWarning: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
accountDeletionRequestSent: Account deletion request sent to admin. You will be logged out.
failedToProcessRequest: Failed to process request. Please try again later.
donationSuccess: Thank you for your donation of ${{amount}}!
googleAuthProtected: Your account is protected by Google Authentication
usernameHint: Your username must be unique and cannot be a reserved admin name.
accountAlreadyLinked: Your account is already linked with an email/password login.
linkHint: If you signed in with Google, you can link an email and password to your account to sign in either way.
emailNotificationsDesc: Receive updates about your requests and new features via email.
browserNotificationsDesc: Get real-time alerts in your browser when AI tasks complete.
systemAlertsDesc: Important account security and maintenance notifications.
no-users-found: No users found matching your search.
alibaba-cloud-config: Configure your Alibaba Cloud Model Studio credentials.
sync-google-desc: Automatically discover and update available Gemini models from Google API.
qwen-model-desc: Add new models or validate existing ones to ensure they are ready for use.
admin-intelligence-desc: Document user behavior, special requests, or internal restrictions here...
notes-visible-admins: Notes are only visible to administrators and help in long-term user management.
changes-logged-audit: Changes will be logged in audit trail
owner-modify-error: The owner account cannot be modified via the admin panel for security reasons.
role-modify-error: You do not have permission to modify user roles.
delete-model-confirm: Are you sure you want to delete
model-id-name-required: Model ID and Name are required
admin-notifications-desc: Receive alerts for new user requests and system events.
auto-approve-requests-desc: Automatically approve standard limit increase requests.
owner-protection-desc: Strict protection is enabled for alahlyeagle13@gmail.com
owner-protection-warning: The owner account cannot be modified, suspended, or deleted by any other administrator. This is a hard-coded security measure.
high-memory-usage: High memory usage detected in AI worker

name: Name
subject: Subject
aboutSubtitle: The ultimate AI platform for scientific excellence.
platformOverviewDesc: Zootopia Club is a premium AI-powered ecosystem designed to accelerate scientific discovery, streamline complex learning, and empower students with cutting-edge tools.
missionVisionDesc: Our mission is to bridge the gap between traditional scientific education and the limitless potential of artificial intelligence, fostering a future where complex knowledge is accessible to everyone.
whyPlatformExistsDesc: We believe that scientific exploration should be intuitive, engaging, and deeply impactful. By leveraging advanced AI, we simplify intricate concepts, allowing students to focus on what truly matters: understanding and innovation.
developerIntroDesc: As a graduate of Chemistry and Zoology, I created this platform to solve the challenges I faced during my own academic journey. Zootopia Club is the realization of a vision to make scientific exploration a seamless, empowering, and deeply rewarding experience for students worldwide.
please-contact-support-if-this-persists: Please contact support if this persists.
thank-you-for-your-generous-support: Thank you for your generous support!
failed-to-initiate-donation: Failed to initiate donation. Please try again.
payment-method-managed-by-provider: Your payment method is securely managed by the payment provider.
secure-payment-notice: Your payment is processed securely through our trusted payment partners.
refundPolicyNotice: Refunds are available and subject to platform review and payment provider policies. Not all payments are guaranteed to be refundable.
subject: Subject
